benchmark.name: california_housing
benchmark.title: California Housing
benchmark.description: Predict median house value from block group features â€” regression, ~20.6K rows, all numeric.

pipeline.methodology:
1. Original dataset loaded and target column determined
2. Dataset split into train (80%) and test (20%) with seed 42 (stratified for classification)
3. Target column moved to last position (DataPruning convention)
4. Preprocessing: standardized preprocessing and feature alignment
5. Train/test feature spaces aligned (intersection of one-hot columns)
6. DataPruning optimization applied to TRAINING SET ONLY — test set untouched
7. Safety layer: reduction cap + class preservation (train set only)
8. Models trained on original train set and optimized train set
9. Both evaluated on the SAME untouched test set
10. Delta = Optimized − Original (positive = improvement after optimization)

data_redistribution_policy: This repository contains only metrics, charts, and methodology. Original datasets must be downloaded from their respective sources using the provided download scripts. Pruned output is the TRAINING SUBSET only — processed by the DataPruning pipeline, not the original full dataset. Users should verify licensing terms before redistributing any dataset files.
